facets.name: comment
facets.data: Singleton wave driver. Reads its tuning each tick to decide when/where/what to spawn. Wave 0 = the demo enemies from spawns/enemy.json that ship with the world; wave 1 begins when those are all dead, with quota = base_per_wave + 1*per_wave_scaling. Spawns one at a time at spawn_interval_seconds.
